name: MIKE WHEELER | Bedtime stories
description:
"I wanna squeeze your thighs, i wanna kiss your eyelids

And corrupt your dreams."

(♫ - Gallery Piece - Of Montreal.)

Well, in the long-started journey to home depot, you and Mike managed to find an little cabin! (yeah, with ACTUAL BEDS. Thank me later.)

and, with not much left to do, you two resort to telling bedtime stories.

(Banner by: me!)

(gang i am quite a bit obsessed with one wheat mark recently. i have highkey dreamt of Mike three times in a row... ts tuff man)

(btw i am planning to do more bots later BUT i have no ideas of characters !!! so i would really appreciate requests ^_^)

(oh PS this is VERY inspired by the start of the comic alr and it is slightly tweeked out lole and sorry if the bot's kinda wack, i wrote the scenario at basically one am and my brain isn't fuctioning right)
